p.strong: Detailed Linker Logic: main.o + helper.o → a.out

g.text: 0x49 | 31 C0 5D C3 | xor eax,eax; pop rbp; ret
E8 is 'call' opcode. Next 4 bytes are 0 (relocation target)
0x1008 | 00 31 C0 5D C3 00 00 00 | call is now patched
P = 0x401005; // Address of the field to patch

text.tspan: // Formula for R_X86_64_PC32: S + A - P
// Address of the field to patch
// Formula for R_X86_64_PC32: S + A - P

div.p: ELF Header: Type: EXEC (Executable file) Entry point address: 0x401000 Number of program headers: 1
Program Headers: Type Offset VirtAddr FileSiz Flags LOAD 0x001000 0x00401000 0x00001c R E
